case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. BIVETT BRACKETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BRACKETT, BIVETT DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2018
DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B)(2); (2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100042456) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60 (A) (TRANSACTION ID # 100042456) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRACKETT, BIVETT $4,511.97 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,752.97, SEE SCANNED DOC
